zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey Egerton de Warburton於1398年出生在英國爾瓦布爾頓時，他的父親Peter de Warburton I34歲，母親Alice de Braylesford30歲。他於1420年與Ellen Leigh Bruyn在英國英格蘭爾阿爾 霍爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1448年在英國爾諾頓享年50歲，埋葬在英國爾諾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffrey Egerton de Warburton于1398年出生在英国爾瓦布爾頓时，他的父亲Peter de Warburton I34岁，母亲Alice de Braylesford30岁。他于1420年与Ellen Leigh Bruyn在英国英格兰爾阿爾 霍爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1448年在英国爾諾頓享年50岁，埋葬在英国爾諾頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Warburton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Greater Manchester (formerly in Cheshire) called Warburton, from the Old English female personal name Wǣrburg (composed of the elements wǣr ‘pledge’ + burh ‘fortress’) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Warbritton
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Warburton  . This form of the surname is not found in English sources.

variants.name: Warbington
meanings: English (Lancashire): perhaps a variant of   Warburton  ; otherwise a habitational name from a lost or unidentified place.

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

nameMeanings.name: Egerton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, originally a local name from any of various places in Bedfordshire, Merseyside, and Nottinghamshire, so named from Old English eorfor ‘wild boar’ + tūn ‘settlement’. Sometimes the name may be bestowed in honour of Everton Football Club.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey Egerton de Warburton was born in 1398, in Warburton, Cheshire, England, his father, Peter de Warburton I, was 34 and his mother, Alice de Braylesford, was 30. He married Ellen Leigh Bruyn in 1420, in Arley Hall, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1448, in Norton, Cheshire, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Norton, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey Egerton de Warburton est né en 1398, à Warburton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Peter de Warburton I, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Alice de Braylesford, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Ellen Leigh Bruyn en 1420, à Arley Hall, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1448, à Norton, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Norton, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffrey Egerton de Warburton 1398 in Warburton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Peter de Warburton I 34 und seine Mutter Alice de Braylesford 30. Er hat 1420 in Arley Hall, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Ellen Leigh Bruyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1448 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Norton, Cheshire, England und wurde in Norton, Cheshire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Ellen Leigh Bruyn nel 1420, nel Arley Hall, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Egerton de Warburtonが1398年にイギリスチェシュアイアワーブルトンで生まれた時，父Peter de Warburton Iは34歳，母Alice de Braylesfordは30歳であった。1420年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアルリー ハルでEllen Leigh Bruynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1448年にイギリスチェシュアイアノートンで50歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアノートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Egerton de Warburton(이)가 1398년 영국 체실르 워버턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Peter de Warburton I(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Braylesford(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 알리 홀에서 Ellen Leigh Bruyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1448년 영국 체실르 노르턴에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 노르턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey Egerton de Warburton nasceu em 1398, em Warburton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Peter de Warburton I, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Braylesford, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellen Leigh Bruyn em 1420, em Arley Hall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey Egerton de Warburton родился в 1398 г. в местности варбуртон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Peter de Warburton I было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Alice de Braylesford, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen Leigh Bruyn в 1420 г. в местности арли холл, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1448 г. в местности нортон, чешир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности нортон, чешир, Англия.
